name: CytomX Therapeutics, Inc.
business: CytomX Therapeutics is a clinical-stage, oncology-focused biopharmaceutical company that develops conditionally activated, masked biologics using its PROBODY technology platform, with a current pipeline including Varseta-M (anti-EpCAM ADC) and CX-801 (masked interferon alpha-2b) both in Phase 1 trials for cancer indications such as colorectal cancer and melanoma.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage, oncology-focused biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing innovative therapies to address major unmet need in oncology.

catalysts.event: Phase 1 Varseta-M data presentation at a medical meeting
catalysts.sentence: We plan to present additional Phase 1 Varseta-M data at a medical meeting in 2026 and aim to align with the FDA in 2026 on a potential registrational study designed for Varseta-M monotherapy in advanced late-line CRC.

catalysts.event: Initial data from Varseta-M combination with bevacizumab
catalysts.sentence: Initial data from the combination study with bevacizumab is expected by the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1b/2 study of Varseta-M with bevacizumab and chemotherapy
catalysts.sentence: A Phase 1b/2 study in combination with bevacizumab and chemotherapy is expected to start by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 expansion cohorts in additional indications for Varseta-M
catalysts.sentence: We also continue to evaluate additional non-CRC, EpCAM positive indications for potential Varseta-M development and anticipate initiating Phase 1 expansion cohorts in one or more additional indications in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Phase 1 data from CX-801 and KEYTRUDA combination dose escalation
catalysts.sentence: Phase 1 clinical data from the CX-801 and KEYTRUDA combination dose escalation portion of the study are expected by the end of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Over 1.9 million new colorectal cancer cases diagnosed annually worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: CRC which is one of the largest unmet needs in oncology with over 1.9 million cases diagnosed annually around the world.

tamClaims.claim: Estimated over 3 million global colorectal cancer cases by 2040.
tamClaims.sentence: It is also a disease that is expected to grow and estimated that there will be over 3 million cases globally by 2040.

tamClaims.claim: More than 35,000 patients in the U.S. with third-line or later metastatic colorectal cancer.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that there are more than 35,000 patients in the U.S. with 3 rd line or later metastatic CRC, with the number expected to grow over the next decade.
